name: eventstream-authoring-cli
description: > Create, wire, and publish Fabric Eventstream real-time streaming topologies via the Items REST API. Build definitions with 25 source types (Event Hubs, IoT Hub, CDC, Kafka, SampleData), 8 operators (Filter, Aggregate, GroupBy, Join, ManageFields, Union, Expand, SQL), 4 destinations (Lakehouse, Eventhouse, Activator, Custom Endpoint), DefaultStream/DerivedStream routing. Use to: (1) author Eventstream topology, (2) add Event Hub source, (3) add filter operator, (4) add CDC source with Debezium
author: microsoft
